name: Duncan Sports Park & Activity Center
description: Duncan Sports Park & Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Duncan, OK. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Eddie Palmer Park
description: Eddie Palmer Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marlow, OK. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Simmons Center Recreation Center
description: Simmons Center Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Duncan, OK. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like water, restrooms, and locker rooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
